---
title: "Viewing Legal Hold Cases In Workspace"
---

The Legal Hold Management tab allows you to create and edit legal hold cases. See the topics on  Creating a Legal Hold Case and Editing a Legal Hold Case for additional information. You can also view the records that are assigned to a specific legal hold case.

To view legal hold records in Workspace:

1.  Open Workspace.
2.  Click the Governance tab on the left pane.   ![The Governance tab in Workspace](data:image/png;base64,)    Note: The  Governance  tab in Workspace is available only for users with Record Manager permissions.
3.  Click the Legal Hold Management tab. The following list is displayed:
-  Legal Hold Case displays the name of the legal hold case.
-  Reason for Hold displays the reason why the legal hold was initiated, such as pending litigation, regulatory request, or internal investigation.
-  Total Records Held displays the number of records added to the legal hold case. To view the records added to the legal hold case, click on the number of held records.
-  Date of Creation displays the date when the legal hold case was created.
-  Creator displays who created the legal hold case.
4.  Optional: Manage the list of records in the Legal Hold Management tab:
-  Items per page: Select a different number in this field in the lower-left corner to change the number of items displayed on each page of the document list.
-  x: Click this button to reset records selection.
The legal hold cases list is displayed in the selected configuration.
